title: PPIP - Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Don't Share
scenario: After onboarding as guest, declining PPIP data sharing and handling iOS location permission shows Home screen with "Share data" toggle OFF in Account settings.
steps: Observe PPIP dialog titled 'Help us improve your experience'
(iOS only) Handle the location permission prompt
Verify the dialog closes and Home screen is displayed
Navigate to App Settings > General > Account
Verify the toggle is set to OFF

Verify the description explains that basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) is shared, no personal information is collected, and data is not shared with third parties
expected: After tapping "Don't Share" and handling the location permission prompt (iOS only), the PPIP dialog closes, the Home screen is displayed, and in App Settings > General > Account, the "Share data" toggle is present and set to OFF with the correct description.
